title: Initial review of order validation test failure
body: Quick look at the CI failure for test_validate_order_case. The error message shows ValueError thrown from validate_order. Not sure yet whether the input is negative or something else. Need to inspect the test arguments.

title: Test environment check for order validation
body: Verified that the test suite runs under Python 3.11.2 and pytest 7.4.0. The validate_order function is imported from order_utils. No environment issues found that could cause the ValueError. Still suspect edge-case input.

title: Debugging session: order validation
body: We traced the issue in test_validate_order_case to the validate_order function. It does not handle negative numbers correctly. The function should return False for negative values, but it raises ValueError instead. When the test expects False, the assertion fails. This note is from the last debugging session.
